calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, Jan. 7, 2015 in Department 525:
Jenny Chan Lee, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness/husband Alan Lee.
No Appearance by Appellant/Defendant, John Y. Wong, .

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Respondent/Plaintiff and witness have sworn.

The Court informs Jenny C. Lee that the appeal is filed untimely by appellant therefore, the appeal will be dismissed and Small Claims Judgment will stands. Matter is submitted.

Judge Pro Tempore: James Fleming; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
